creator: thomas.e.zander@googlemail.com
text:
The attached patch updates cad/linux-eagle5 to the most recent version.
Also some minor changes:
- Add conflicts for old eagle versions
- Typo fixes
- Enforce linux-2.6 ABI to be present as eagle 5 requires recent linux glibc


Additional request:
@committer: Please remove cad/linux-eagle and german/linux-eagle from the ports tree (I maintained these legacy versions.). The old versions seem to be neither supported by nor available from cadsoft anymore.

@maintainer: Mike, do you still want to maintain that port? If not, I am happy to take back maintainership.

Fix: Patch attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
